items.title: SIP & Mutual Funds
items.description: Build long-term wealth through disciplined, goal-oriented SIP investments in carefully selected mutual funds.

items.title: Stock Market
items.description: Direct equity strategies and portfolio management for growth-focused investors seeking market-beating returns.

items.title: Insurance
items.description: Comprehensive life, health, and general insurance planning to protect your family and wealth from the unexpected.

items.title: Retirement Planning
items.description: Build a retirement corpus that funds the life you've earned — through NPS, MFs, and systematic withdrawal plans.

items.title: PMS
items.description: Portfolio Management Services for HNI investors seeking personalized, actively managed equity strategies.

items.title: Private Equity
items.description: Access curated pre-IPO and private equity opportunities with strong growth potential ahead of public listings.

items.title: Bonds
items.description: Fixed-income and debt instruments offering predictable returns — government bonds, NCDs, and corporate bonds.

items.title: Loan Against Security
items.description: Unlock liquidity from your existing portfolio without selling — borrow against your mutual funds or shares.

items.title: AIF
items.description: Alternative Investment Funds for sophisticated investors seeking diversification beyond traditional assets.

items.title: Unlisted Securities
items.description: Invest in high-growth unlisted shares before they go public and capture early-stage appreciation.

items.title: Gift City
items.description: Access international markets and global funds through India's GIFT City IFSC with tax-efficient structures.

items.title: International Equities
items.description: Diversify your portfolio globally with curated access to US, European, and Asian market opportunities.

items.title: Will
items.description: Legally sound will drafting and estate documentation services to ensure your assets reach the right hands.

items.title: Trust
items.description: Generational wealth protection through private family trusts — structured for tax efficiency and seamless transfer.

items.title: Family Office
items.description: Complete wealth management for ultra-HNI families — investment, tax, legal, estate, and philanthropy under one roof.

items.title: Debt Financing
items.description: Structured debt solutions for businesses — NCDs, private bonds, and corporate debt with 9–14% yields.

items.title: Equity Financing
items.description: Private equity and PIPE deal facilitation for businesses seeking growth capital from institutional investors.

items.title: Exit Planning
items.description: Strategic business exit planning — valuation, buyer identification, tax structuring, and deal execution.

items.title: Succession Planning
items.description: Family business continuity planning — leadership transition, shareholding structures, and governance frameworks.

items.title: Estate Planning
items.description: Comprehensive five-pillar estate planning: Will, Trust, Nominees, Insurance, and Tax-efficient transfer structures.

items.title: Elite Advisory
items.description: Bespoke ₹5 Cr+ wealth advisory with dedicated management, alternative assets, and 12–16% targeted yields.
